citation.description: build_payload emits full coaching record: move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, coaching — all via .get() (schema-tolerant). Test at tests/unit/test_audit_coaching_fidelity.py:30-49 asserts all five fields survive.

criteria.criterion: The plan-review sidecar payload persists each pass-4 coaching note with its full shape — move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, and the rendered coaching prose — not just {move_id, finding_refs}. Oracle: a unit test driving build_payload with a verdict whose coaching[] carries the full shape and asserting all five fields survive in the emitted payload.

citation.description: build_payload stores verdict.get('coaching', []) verbatim (no projection). Regression test at tests/unit/test_audit_coaching_fidelity.py:68-83 asserts all five fields (move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, coaching) survive in the payload.

criteria.criterion: The code-review sidecar payload persists pass-4 coaching losslessly (full record shape). Oracle: a unit test driving build_payload with a full-shape coaching note and asserting the fields survive.

citation.description: All three tests in the file are concrete (no skip/xfail), import real modules, and call real build_payload functions. The implementation in both sidecars is non-stubbed. CI pass cannot be directly observed from the codebase, but no contrary signals exist.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test pass.
